access.loading_pattern:
from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os
load_dotenv(os.path.join(BRAND_PATH, 'credentials.env'))

operations.name: get_reports
operations.notes: Time zone configured at advertiser level. Conversions = web_event_add_to_cart, web_event_purchase, etc.

operations.name: create_campaign
operations.notes: Always create DISABLE (paused). One campaign per objective.

operations.name: upload_video
operations.notes: Returns video_id. Required for ad creation. MP4 max 500MB.

naming_conventions.separator_rules: Tiret (-) = séparateur. Pas d'underscore ni accent.

known_limitations: advertiser_id strictly required on every call.
Pixel events depend on TikTok pixel install (not API-driven).
learned_rules: Always batch ad creation max 20 per request.
Verify ad status post-create via GET /ad/get/ (timeouts can mask success).
TikTok algorithm penalizes low-spend testing ; min daily budget per adgroup ~20 USD.
